text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Takarazuka Kinen. A while has
passed since our setback at the Mainichi Okan,
but El Condor Pasa is set to make an amazing
comeback.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa declares to Silence Suzuka that
she'll beat her, even if she doesn't have what it
takes.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, Silence Suzuka quietly remarks that El
Condor Pasa possesses a power that she herself
does not.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That said, she has no intention of losing. The
clash between these two competitive souls...
begin now!
